series_metadata.series_title: Transfer Assurance Guides - Articulation and Transfer
series_metadata.series_description: Meeting minutes, curriculum outlines and policy drafts from multiple Transfer Assurance Guide (TAG) meetings, Policy Review Committee meetings, Pilot Groups, etc. stemming from the work done by the Board of Regents and the Articulation and Transfer Council to meet the requirements of HB95 (ORC 3333.16).
